events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes rebar placement defects: bars resting on vapor barrier/soil, missing chairs, bars touching side forms. This is non-compliant with ACI 318 cover requirements. Decision should be fail. Work stage is rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 70-80%. Risk is high/critical because concrete cover is compromised, leading to corrosion and structural deficiency.
